lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor surface scratches. The interior shows light wear on the seating surfaces. All mechanical systems are fully operational.
This vehicle is in good condition. It has been well-maintained and shows only minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior. All major mechanical systems are operational and the car runs well.

This is a wonderful vehicle that has been well-maintained and is ready for its next owner! It offers a smooth and reliable driving experience, and while it shows some minor signs of normal use, it's in great shape overall. You’ll love how dependable and comfortable this car is for your daily commutes or weekend trips!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-cared for by its previous owner. The exterior retains a strong shine, though there are a few minor surface scratches and small stone chips consistent with regular use. Inside, the cabin is clean and smoke-free; while there is some light bolster wear on the driver's seat, all features and electronics are fully functional. Mechanically, the car runs smoothly and has a consistent service history, making it a reliable choice for its next owner.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained over the years. The exterior is clean with only minor surface scratches and a small door ding consistent with regular use. Inside, the upholstery is in great shape with no tears, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Mechanically, it runs smoothly, the transmission shifts well, and all major systems are fully functional. It’s a solid, dependable car that presents well and is ready for its next owner.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical upkeep and preserved interior integrity, it offers a refined driving experience that balances performance with exceptional value. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this unit stands as a testament to quality ownership and reliable engineering.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has clearly been well-cared for over the years. It runs like a dream and is just waiting for someone new to take it on some fun adventures! If you’re looking for a reliable ride that still looks great on the road, this is definitely the one for you. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come see it!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power plant, delivering linear power via six individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual and a mechanical limited-slip differential. Chassis integrity is verified with documented subframe reinforcement. It retains its factory-tuned suspension geometry, offering exceptional torsional rigidity and communicative feedback through the hydraulic steering rack. A well-maintained example of Bavarian engineering ready for the apex.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Maintenance records available. Clean interior. Reliable performance.

Offering a well-maintained and reliable vehicle that perfectly bridges the gap between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a beautiful luster, with only minor cosmetic imperfections from standard road use, while the body remains straight and rust-free. Step inside to a clean, non-smoker interior where the upholstery has been preserved with care, and every button, dial, and screen functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is in great health; it has been serviced regularly, including a recent oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. The engine runs smoothly, the transmission shifts seamlessly, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. This is a turn-key opportunity for a buyer looking for a solid, dependable ride that has been treated with respect and diligence. Ready for its next chapter with a new owner who appreciates a car that looks great and drives even better.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Presenting in commendable condition, it balances sophisticated engineering with dependable performance. Every aspect of this automobile has been vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and safety, offering a refined driving experience that exceeds expectations for its class. A definitive choice for those who demand excellence and long-term reliability.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior mechanical order, this example offers a refined driving experience characterized by responsive handling and a well-preserved interior. Every component has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness. We invite you to inspect this distinguished motorcar, which stands as a testament to its diligent previous ownership and continued excellence.

Hey there! 👋 I'm selling my awesome ride and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It's in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to go! It's been well-loved and well-maintained, so you can just hop in and enjoy the ride. Can't wait for it to find a great new home!

The exterior finish retains a deep, impressive gloss, with only the minor, inevitable stone chips typical of careful highway driving. Hey there! Are you looking for a super reliable ride that's ready for its next big adventure? I’m selling my car, and it’s honestly in such great shape! It's been well-cared for, runs smoothly, and is just waiting for a new home. You're going to love how it drives—come take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is a driver-focused example featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through its six individual throttle bodies. It comes equipped with the preferred Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential lock. Critical preventive maintenance has been addressed, including a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and subframe reinforcement to ensure structural rigidity under high lateral loads. The suspension has been refreshed with Bilstein dampers to maintain the chassis's legendary communicative handling. While the exterior shows minor patina consistent with spirited use, the mechanical vitals remain robust, with consistent compression across all cylinders and crisp gear engagement. A perfect candidate for the enthusiast seeking a pure analog driving experience.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Regularly serviced. Runs and drives well.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily usability. The exterior is finished in a deep metallic gloss that has been regularly waxed; while you may find a few minor stone chips on the lower front bumper from normal highway driving, the body panels are exceptionally straight and free of any notable dings. Inside, the cabin remains a refined space with supple leather seating that shows only minimal softening on the driver’s bolster. All electronic features—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function perfectly. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented service history that includes a recent oil change and a comprehensive multi-point inspection. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are seamless, and the tires have plenty of tread remaining. This is a turn-key opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking a reliable, well-cared-for example that looks and drives beautifully.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and value. Its sophisticated aesthetic and robust mechanical integrity make it a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking quality and reliability.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic presence, this unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and safety. A testament to responsible ownership and diligent care, it offers a sophisticated driving experience and substantial long-term value.

It’s in solid shape and ready for plenty more adventures with its next owner. Perfect for anyone who wants a dependable vehicle that's been loved and cared for. Come take a look, I'd love to show it to you!

Offered is a mechanically robust E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six equipped with individual throttle bodies. This unit has received extensive preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. The Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox offers precise gate engagement, transmitting power through a factory limited-slip differential. The chassis benefits from refreshed bushings and Bilstein dampers, maintaining the platform’s renowned handling characteristics and steering feedback. While the exterior shows minor road-going patina, the powertrain remains in peak operational form with a linear power band and exceptional throttle response.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. Mechanically, the car is in robust health; it has been serviced at recommended intervals, featuring a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that starts reliably every time. Recent maintenance includes a fresh oil service and a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it is road-ready. This car provides a quiet, confident ride and represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.
